name: CIC Services, LLC v. Internal Revenue Service
question: Does the Anti-Injunction Act’s bar on lawsuits for the purpose of restraining the assessment or collection of taxes also bar challenges to unlawful regulatory mandates that are not taxes?
description: A case in which the Court held that the Anti-Injunction Act’s bar on lawsuits for the purpose of restraining the assessment or collection of taxes does not bar challenges to unlawful regulatory mandates that are not taxes.
